message:
feat(core): migrate sync primitives to runtime_compat (wa-3d14m)

Replace tokio::sync::{Mutex, RwLock, Semaphore} with runtime_compat
wrappers in pool, ipc, mcp, undo, workflows, notifications,
restore_scrollback, wezterm mock modules.

runtime.rs, tailer.rs, and snapshot_engine.rs retain tokio primitives
(non-Send guard in tokio::spawn deferred to Phase 4: wa-1bznu).

cargo check: default + asupersync-runtime pass. 4102 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
